raw_model_outputs:
<tool_call>
<return_to_orchestrator>
<return_text>
TEC Analysis Report: midlat_europe (2024-03-01 to 2024-04-01)

Basic Statistics:
- Total data points: 744
- High TEC threshold (90th percentile): 46.52

High TEC Intervals:
- Detected 14 intervals exceeding the high threshold.

Stable Intervals:
- No stable intervals detected.

Interpretation:
The midlat_europe region exhibited elevated TEC activity during the specified period, with 14 distinct intervals surpassing the 90th percentile threshold of 46.52. No stable intervals were identified, suggesting persistent or fluctuating ionospheric conditions rather than sustained calm periods.
</return_text>
</return_to_orchestrator>

<tool_call>
